% check a.php
a.php:10:1: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:14:1: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	use Traits\Name;
}

$foo = new Foo;
$name = $foo->name;
#debugType $name
-- b.php --
<?php

class FooParent
{
	use Traits\Name;
}

class FooChild extends FooParent
{
}

$foo = new FooChild;
$name = $foo->name;
#debugType $name
-- t.php --
<?php

namespace Traits;

trait Name
{
	/** @var string */
	public $name;
}
